memberdef.name: SLR_INDEX
memberdef.initializer: XSECURE_SLR_INDEX_0 /* Change this for other SLRs */

memberdef.name: TestMessage
memberdef.initializer: = "This is a test message for MLDSA signature generation and verification"

briefdescription.para: This function displays Data of specified length in hexadecimal format.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to be displayed
Length of the data to be displayed

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the MLDSA client example.

listitem.para: Error code if the example fails.
